_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 mutation expands an EGFR-dependent peripheral nerve progenitor that confers neurofibroma tumorigenic potential.

_contextSnippet: Cells from both genotypes differentiated into smooth muscle/fibroblast-like cells, as assayed by smooth muscle actin (SMA) immunoreactivity and large round nuclei with a flattened, fibroblastic morphology
details: Successfully detected smooth muscle/fibroblast-like cell differentiation in both genotypes with SMA immunoreactivity and characteristic morphology
